title: Nursery Rhyme. LVIII. Tales.
content:
The lion and the unicorn
            Were fighting for the crown;
        The lion beat the unicorn
            All round about the town.
        Some gave them white bread,
            And some gave them brown;
        Some gave them plum-cake,
            And sent them out of town.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Unknown delivers a powerful performance in "Nursery Rhyme. LVIII. Tales."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
